vocab.meaning: bắt đầu dấn thân vào một con đường sự nghiệp
vocab.example: Upon graduation, I intend to embark on a career path in sustainable finance, as it aligns perfectly with my academic background.

vocab.meaning: tiếp tục con đường học vấn (học cao lên)
vocab.example: I am strongly considering moving abroad to further my education and obtain a Master's degree in Artificial Intelligence.

vocab.meaning: tích lũy kinh nghiệm thực tế
vocab.example: I believe it's crucial to gain hands-on experience through an internship before committing to a full-time long-term contract.

vocab.meaning: đạt được bằng cấp/chứng chỉ chuyên môn
vocab.example: My immediate priority after finishing my degree is to attain a professional qualification in chartered accountancy.

vocab.meaning: thăng tiến trong môi trường doanh nghiệp
vocab.example: I’m quite ambitious, so my long-term goal is to join a multinational corporation and eventually climb the corporate ladder.

vocab.word: carve out a niche for myself
vocab.meaning: tạo dựng chỗ đứng/thị trường riêng cho bản thân
vocab.example: I hope to carve out a niche for myself in the competitive field of digital marketing by focusing specifically on data analytics.

vocab.meaning: nuôi dưỡng tinh thần khởi nghiệp
vocab.example: Instead of seeking a traditional 9-to-5 job, I want to nurture my entrepreneurial spirit by launching my own tech startup.

vocab.meaning: rút ngắn khoảng cách (giữa lý thuyết và thực tế)
vocab.example: I’m looking for a junior role that will allow me to bridge the gap between academic theory and real-world application.

vocab.meaning: mở rộng tầm hiểu biết/nhãn quan
vocab.example: Taking a gap year to travel across Europe would certainly help me broaden my horizons before I settle down into a career.

vocab.meaning: đạt được một vị trí công việc có thu nhập cao
vocab.example: After years of rigorous study, my primary objective is to secure a lucrative position in a leading architectural firm.
